---
title: "Week 2 --- Graphics"
subtitle: "May 25 - 29, 2026"
---

::: callout-note
**Monday is Memorial Day (no class).** Week starts Tuesday.
:::

We introduce data frames and the *grammar of graphics*. By Friday you'll be making layered plots from real data and critiquing other people's visualizations.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Slides & Notes | Code & Data |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mon May 25 | **No class (Memorial Day)** | - | - |
| Tue May 26 | Data frames · tibbles · grammar of graphics | [Slides](day6-data-frames-slides.html) · [Page](day6-data-frames-page.html) · [PDF](day6-data-frames.pdf) | [day6-activity.R](day6-activity.qmd){download="day1-activity.qmd"} |
| Wed May 27 | ggplot2 basics · aesthetics · geoms | [Slides](day7-ggplot2-slides.html) · [Page](day7-ggplot2-page.html) · [PDF](day7-ggplot2.pdf) | [day7-activity.R](day7-activity.R){download="day7-activity.R"} |
| Thu May 28 | Multivariable graphics · facets · scales | [Slides](day8-multivariable-slides.html) · [Page](day8-multivariable-page.html) · [PDF](day8-multivariable.pdf) | [day8-activity.R](day8-activity.R){download="day8-activity.R"} |
| Fri May 29 | **Quiz 2** · AI coding/critique activity | [Slides](day9-ai-coding-slides.html) · [Page](day9-ai-coding-page.html) · [PDF](day9-ai-coding.pdf) | [day9-activity.R](day9-activity.R){download="day9-activity.R"} |

## Readings due this week

- Before Tue: *Data Computing* Ch 5 ([DC §5.1–5.6](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18317722)): introduction to data graphics
- Before Wed: *Data Computing* Ch 6 ([DC §6.1–6.5](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18317724)): frames, glyphs, scales, facets, layers
- Before Thu: *Data Computing* Ch 8 ([DC §8.1–8.3](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18317726)): specifying graphs, axes, labels

## Assignments due this week

- **HW 2**: due Fri May 29, 11:59 p.m.
- **Quiz 2**: in class Friday May 29
